formatted_display: English: Friday, 08 May 2026 | Nepali: Friday, 25 Baishakh 2083
quote: It's beautiful to be alone. To be alone does not mean to be lonely. It means the mind is not influenced and contaminated by society.
formatted_quote: "It's beautiful to be alone. To be alone does not mean to be lonely. It means the mind is not influenced and contaminated by society." - Jiddu Krishnamurti
